titleStmt.title: SII 39.196: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 196. (A.R. No. 196 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGOPĀLADĒVA-7TH YEAR (1257 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of land, by purchase in Kaṭṭaṉūr alias Svamisantosha Chaturvedimaṅgalam alias Puttagaram and made it as tirunāmattukkāṇī to the temples, by Vīravaḷḷippillār Dēvaperumāḷ Maḻavarāyaṉ of the same village. The engraver was named as Pērarulāchchāryaṉ of Daṇḍaga nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ civicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu
taṉu nāyaṟṟu Orunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu
kaṭṭaṉūṟ puttakaramāṉa cuvāmi cantoṣaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu viravallippiḷḷār Aruḷ
Aḻittāṉ pakkal paṟṟuḻāṉ tevapperumāḷāṉ maḻavarāyaṉeṉ Ivar pakkal nāṉ pon
kuṭuttu koṇṭa paṅkālu Eḷviḷai nilamuṅ kollaiyum maṉaiyum poreṟṟukku Iṉakku naṉṟākac ciṅkā ntikke Oru taḷikai cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatāka kuṭutteṉ tevapperumāṉ
maḻavarāyaṉeṉ §
Ivvakarattil piccaṉ Allāḷap perumāḷ paṅkāl koṇṭa pākam Araiyum melpaṭiyāṉ viṟṟuk koḷvateṉṟu viṭu
kaiyil Itu Araiyum Ākappaṅku Oṉṟum Ivvakarattu Attik kuṟicciṅkattiṉ kāṇippaṅkāy koṇṭuṭaiya paṅku Arai
yum Ivvakarattu Attikkuṟi Āḷumpirāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ kāṇap paṅkiraṇṭu koṅku kāle Araikkālum dāṉaṅkuṭutta Araikkā
ku Araiyum Āittamu tāmasvāmi santoṣac caturvvetimaṅkalattu 10 7 vatu tai māta varaikku poreṟṟukku Eḻu
ti Uṭai koṇṭuṭaiya paṅkukaḷum dāṉaṅ ḷḷaṉavum Ākac cernta tirunāmattuk kāṇi paṅku nālu Ippaṅ
ku nālukkum Ivai kalveṭṭiṉeṉ taṇṭaka nāṭṭuk peraruḷācāriyaṉeṉ Eḻuttuḥ ..
Digital edition of SII 39.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
